tools.name: navigate_to
tools.notes: RPC timeout: 'auto' maps to 30000ms; RPC call adds 5000ms buffer when executed. Returns DOM state when return_dom_state=true.

tools.name: scroll_page
tools.notes: Use element_index (0-based) when action='to_element'. RPC timeout default ~10000ms.

tools.name: get_dom_extra_elements
tools.description: Paginated access to interactive elements in viewport
tools.notes: Returns markdown-formatted list. Designed to avoid flooding AI context; use pagination.

tools.name: click_element
tools.description: Click interactive elements using element index from DOM state
tools.notes: Primary selector: element_index. RPC timeout ~15000ms. On failure returns error codes/messages (e.g. ELEMENT_NOT_CLICKABLE).

tools.name: type_value
tools.description: Set values on form inputs and simulate keyboard input

value.description: string|number|boolean|array for multi-select; special key syntax like {Enter}

tools.notes: Supports keyboard-style inputs (auto-detect). 'auto' timeout uses intelligent calculation; RPC timeout may be large (up to minutes). Returns dom_changed flag when DOM mutated.

tools.name: manage_tabs
tools.description: Open, switch, and close browser tabs
tools.notes: Use tab_id to target a tab. Opening can return new_tab_id in result. RPC timeouts vary (open uses 30000ms).

dom_state_resource.notes: Overview returns AI-friendly Markdown with metadata, first 20 interactive elements and a simplified DOM block (```html```). Use get_dom_extra_elements for pagination.

readability.notes: Supports Read Mode via parserReadability() and getReadabilityContent(tabId) which returns structured readability content (title, excerpt, text, etc.).

selectors.secondary: xpath (some tools accept xpath), enhanced CSS selectors via DOMElementNode.getEnhancedCssSelector()
selectors.notes: The extension builds a DOM tree and maps highlightIndex->DOMElementNode; preferred approach is to use element_index for stability. Schemas in packages/schema-utils also include 'index' and optional 'xpath'.

state_sessions.cookies_local_storage: Managed by browser context; no central cookie API in host code. If you log in within the same tab/session, the session persists while the tab/browser instance exists.
state_sessions.multiple_tabs: Supported. Tools accept tab_id (string/integer depending on interface) and manage_tabs tool exists to control tabs. CurrentStateResource exposes tab info.
state_sessions.notes: To persist sessions across n8n calls, call tools/actions that reuse the same tab_id or keep the browser host instance running.

limits_timeouts_errors.type_value_timeouts_ms: auto or up to 600000 validated in code
